import csv
import itertools
with open('multiplication_table.txt', 'w', newline='') as f:
    writer = csv.writer(f)
    for r in itertools.count():
        row = [f'{i}x{j}={i*j}' for i in range(1, 11) for j in range(1, 11) if (i-1) * 10 + (j-1) == r]
        if any(row):
            writer.writerow(row)

import csv
import itertools
with open('multiplication_table.txt', 'w', newline='') as f:
    for r in range(100):
        row = [f'{i}x{j}={i*j}' for i in range(1, 11) for j in range(1, 11) if (i-1) * 10 + (j-1) == r]
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerow(row)
